## How it was tested

<!-- ruff + pytest output, and a bench number if quality/cost is affected. -->

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (no live network)

- [ ] Docs updated if config / request surface / defaults changed
- [ ] No secrets, prompts, or response bodies added to logs or metrics
